[[File:Me chathead.png|left]]
'''Me''' is a foe encountered during the quest [[Lunar Diplomacy]] in the [[Dream World]]. It is fought during the quest, and is an exact copy of the player wearing full [[Lunar equipment]], only inversed in colour. Despite its high [[Combat level]], it is very weak.

"Me" only attacks by hitting the player with the [[Lunar staff]].

It can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete.

==Trivia==
* The model for Me always appears with body type A in the Nightmare Zone, even if the player's character uses body type B.
* The line "Do I look bothered?" is a reference to Catherine Tate's character {{Wp|Lauren Cooper}}.
* The line "You've got an outrageous accent, you silly thing!" is a reference to the taunting Frenchman in ''{{wp|Monty Python and the Holy Grail}}''.
